mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator
mfa.openAuthenticator: Open your authenticator app to get the one-time code

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

folderTree.deleteCascade: Also delete its contents (credentials and subfolders). When off, writable contents are moved to the root.

share.title: Share resource
share.simulateTooltip: Preview who would gain or lose access
share.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or group…
share.noAccessYet: Nobody has access yet. Search above to share with people or groups.
share.lockedBanner: The vault is locked. Unlock it with your passphrase before sharing — re-encrypting the secret for new recipients requires your private key to stay in memory.

reencrypt.head: The secret will be re-encrypted for these new recipients
reencrypt.sub: {{count}} added · each secret is wrapped individually with the recipient's own public key; your private key and passphrase always stay local and never leave your device.

errors.vaultLocked: The vault is locked. Unlock it with your passphrase before sharing.
errors.noChanges: There are no changes to apply.
errors.noPublicKey: No public key found for {{who}}; access cannot be granted yet.
errors.cannotGetKey: Could not retrieve the key for {{who}}.
errors.cannotLoadGroupMembers: Could not load the members of group "{{group}}".
errors.cannotVerifyKey: Could not verify the key for {{who}} (group "{{group}}").
errors.cannotGetKeyInGroup: Could not retrieve the key for {{who}} (group "{{group}}").
errors.cannotReadSecret: Could not read this resource's existing secret.
